overclock_oolong.name: Overclock Oolong
overclock_oolong.blurb: Smoked over salvaged heatsinks. Everything you practice today sticks a little harder — training sessions land +1 extra.
overclock_oolong.pour_line: It tastes like focus and faintly of solder. Your hands stop asking questions.

kettle_lightning.name: Kettle Lightning
kettle_lightning.blurb: Green tea cut with something the chalkboard only calls "hurry." Walks take half as long today.
kettle_lightning.pour_line: The first sip lands like a starter pistol. The city feels suddenly small.

petrichor_blend.name: Petrichor Blend
petrichor_blend.blurb: Rain on hot concrete, steeped. Softens every room you walk into — heartfelt words land +1 all day.
petrichor_blend.pour_line: It tastes like the hour after an argument ends well. You feel easier to talk to.
